SGCAppliedLeaveLoadingAmount.description: The amount of leave loading applied for the leave type that is subject to Superannuation Guarantee Contributions. *Only applicable for Leave Types with Annual Leave Categories

SGCExemptedLeaveLoadingAmount.description: The amount of leave loading applied for the leave type that is exempt from Superannuation Guarantee Contributions. *Only applicable for Leave Types with Annual Leave Categories

ResetSTPCategorisation.description: Reset the STP categorisations for the leave type. *Only applicable for Leave Types with Annual Leave Categories
